description: Spice up your style with this fashionable, yet spacious, wallet from belmonte. While it's well organised to allow you to carry all your essentials conveniently, it also looks absolutely fabulous with any casual outfit.Dimensions: 11 cm x 9 cmMade of genuine leather for durabilityHas two main compartmentsEight card slots and button closure on either side of the wallet with a zipped pocket in the middle for coinsA flap on the left with two mesh pocketsBranding embossed on the insideCareWipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
